name: Marshall Islands
headline: Marshall Islands CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 39.1 / Developing — rotation backfill cycle. Two May 18 signals: (1) Co-sponsor of Vanuatu's UNGA climate-obligations resolution (vote May 20); (2) Flag state of record for KSL Deyang cargo ship struck by Russian drone in Black Sea — creates a third-country-flag-state-responsibility event not directly governance-conduct but raises profile. BOUNDARY-ADJACENT: 39.1 is 1.9pt below Developing/Functional (40/41) floor. UNGA co-sponsorship is ACC-positive forward signal. Carry-forward at 39.1; ACC-positive scoring window opens post-May 20 vote.

BND.rationale: Sustained. Flag-state-responsibility for KSL Deyang in conflict zone is a maritime IHL question — pending observation of flag-state response.

ACC.rationale: Sustained. UNGA co-sponsorship is ACC-positive forward signal; post-vote scoring window opens May 20-21.

evidence.summary: Amnesty / HRW: Marshall Islands is a co-sponsor of Vanuatu's UNGA climate-obligations resolution (vote May 20).
Al Jazeera May 18: KSL Deyang (Chinese-owned, Marshall Islands-flagged) struck by Russian drone in Black Sea — Marshall Islands is the flag state of record.

keyEvidence: Co-sponsor of Vanuatu's UNGA climate-obligations resolution (vote May 20).
Flag state of record for KSL Deyang cargo ship struck by Russian drone.
UNGA co-sponsorship is ACC-positive forward signal.

rationale: Rotation backfill confirmation. UNGA co-sponsorship is ACC-positive forward signal but vote outcome pending. Flag-state question for KSL Deyang strike is observation-pending. Carry-forward at 39.1. Math: (2.5+3+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5)/8 = 20.5/8 = 2.5625 → ((2.5625-1)/4)*100 = 39.06 → 39.1.
watches: Marshall Islands flag-state response to KSL Deyang strike (maritime IHL frame)
boundaryWatchResolution: Boundary-adjacent but no crossing this cycle. Upgrade potential if (a) UNGA resolution passes, (b) Marshall Islands engages flag-state-responsibility frame for KSL Deyang.

math_check.validator_check: Math clean. Carry-forward confirmation. Post-vote re-assessment window opens.
